en-US.name: Tooth Extraction: Recovery Log
en-US.subtitle: Soft Food & Dry Socket Timer
en-US.promotional_text: Just had a tooth pulled? See which restrictions still apply and which foods are safe again, based on your extraction type. Informational timing tool.
en-US.description:
Just had a tooth pulled and not sure when you can eat that, or when it's finally safe to use a straw again? Tooth Extraction: Recovery Log turns the days after your extraction into one clear, personal timeline - what's still off-limits, what food textures are safe now, and when the dry-socket caution window is open.

The answer is never one-size-fits-all. A simple extraction, a surgical one, an impacted wisdom tooth, or several at once each follow a different clock, and stitches, smoking, and which jaw all shift the windows. So people end up searching the same question at every single meal.

HOW IT WORKS

1. Log your extraction: type, upper or lower, sutures, smoking, age, and the date and time.
2. The app counts the hours since your procedure and moves your timeline forward on its own.
3. Open it any time to see today's stage, which restrictions are still active, and which foods are safe to reintroduce.

About 20 seconds to set up. No account required. Works fully offline.

CORE FEATURES

Today's Stage
Your recovery stage and elapsed time at a glance, with a progress view instead of a vague "a few days."

Active Restrictions
See at a glance whether straws, smoking, and rinsing are still restricted or lifted for your case, each on its own clock.

Food Texture Guide
Where you are in the liquid to soft to normal progression, so you know what's reasonable to eat right now.

Dry-Socket Caution Window
A simple indicator for the days-3-to-5 caution window, with a reminder to contact your dentist if pain increases.

PRO FEATURES
Upgrade to Pro for deeper insights:
- Can I Eat This? checker for specific foods, right now
- Personalized food-reintroduction planner by extraction type and sutures
- Track multiple sites on separate clocks (for example, all four wisdom teeth)
- Exact unlock time for each individual restriction
- Saltwater-rinse and care reminders
- Daily symptom log with an adjusted timeline
- Full recovery history and notes

PRIVACY FIRST
- No account, no login
- All data stored locally on your device
- Works completely offline - no location, no network required
- No tracking, no ads, no third-party analytics

Tooth Extraction: Recovery Log provides general timing and reference information based on common post-extraction guidance. It is not a substitute for the instructions of your dentist or oral surgeon, and it cannot tell you whether a complication is present.
